title: agropyron caudatum
intro: Agropyron caudatum, also known as slender false brome, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agropyron caudatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
